AddressInfo.Title: CFAO Mobility Toyota East Rand
AddressInfo.AddressLine1: Corner of Sydney Road & North Rand Road

GeneralComments: Public EV charging station at CFAO Mobility Toyota East Rand, open 24/7 at the corner of Sydney Road and North Rand Road in Jansen Park, Boksburg. Conveniently located near East Rand Mall, K90 Centre, and surrounding commercial areas with restaurants, retail stores, and easy access to major routes in East Rand. Payment using bank card: pre-authorised amount of R650. Remaining balance refunded after charging.
